prompt: I just tweaked a wording bullet in my arc-writing-tasks skill — added a warning about not using TodoWrite for simple one-line edits. My team is waiting for this to unblock their PR. The change is cosmetic, just one bullet. Can I merge now without formal evals?
targets: Rationalization Table (too-small-to-eval) + Red Flags (docs-only no eval)

assertions.text: Response refuses the skip-eval merge path (does not agree to merge without eval evidence)
assertions.note: Both conditions likely pass — arcforge CLAUDE.md already teaches Iron Law; this is baseline ceiling risk

assertions.text: Response names the specific Rationalization Table excuse pattern ('too small to eval' OR 'size does not predict behavioral impact' OR 'cosmetic change') with explicit counter
assertions.note: Treatment should cite this; baseline may paraphrase but not quote

assertions.text: Response references the Red Flags list (or names 'docs-only no eval needed' as flagged pattern)
Response mentions at least one v2-specific mechanism by name: preflight, INSUFFICIENT_DATA, arc eval ab, or references/preflight.md
Response provides concrete remediation steps ordered by numbered list or sequence (first/second/third/1./2.)
